## Summary

## Validation
- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] No Trello credentials committed
- [ ] Prompts / scripts stay within v1 scope
- [ ] CLI flag changes are intentional and documented

## Review focus
- Python correctness and edge cases
- Error handling and safe failures
- API request correctness
- Backward compatibility of script flags
- Test coverage for resolver logic and failure cases
- Reviewed against `.github/review-instructions.md`
